title: Khipro Heat Wave
lead: Khipro is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.66. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Khipro has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, and the wind speed is 18.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The absence of any Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the temperature has remained consistently high.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
